stories.title: East playoff takeaways: Raptors force Game 7 in OT...
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Eastern Conference's first round.

stories.title: Lakers blow out Rockets, advance to face Thunder
stories.summary: LeBron James took time to enjoy the Lakers' series-clinching win over the Rockets on Friday night, saying the moments are still special, especially because he doesn't know how many more seasons he has left in his career.

stories.title: Pistons roar back to stun ice-cold Magic, force G7...
stories.summary: The top-seeded Detroit Pistons pulled off an incredible rally, erasing a 24-point deficit and beating the Orlando Magic 93-79 to force a Game 7 in their Eastern Conference first-round series.

stories.title: Barrett saves Raptors' season with dramatic 3
stories.summary: Reminiscent of Kawhi Leonard's iconic playoff winner in 2019, RJ Barrett got a friendly bounce to hit the winning 3-pointer in overtime, helping the Raptors force a Game 7 with a 112-110 win over the Cavs on Friday night.

stories.title: Sabres win playoff series for 1st time since 2007
stories.summary: The Sabres defeated the Bruins 4-1 on Friday night in Game 6 to advance to the second round of the NHL playoffs for the first time since 2007.
